source_note: Macros computed from ingredients_table.json; do not hand-edit.

recipes.name: Chipotle chicken and lime rice bowl
method_steps: Rub chicken with chipotle paste, oil, pinch of salt.
Air fry at 200 °C for 14–16 min, flip halfway, until 74 °C internal.
Rinse rice, simmer 12 min in 140 ml water, rest 5 min, fluff.
Stir lime juice and coriander through rice.
Slice chicken, bowl with rice, corn, black beans.

recipes.name: Teriyaki salmon with jasmine rice and pak choi
method_steps: Bake at 200 °C for 12–14 min until flaking.
Sear pak choi in sesame oil 2 min.
Plate rice, salmon, pak choi, sesame seeds, spring onion.

recipes.name: Thai green chicken curry with jasmine rice
method_steps: Fry curry paste in a dry pan 1 min until fragrant.
Add coconut milk, bring to simmer.
Add green beans and bamboo, simmer 5 min.
Finish with fish sauce and basil. Serve over rice.

recipes.name: Beef and broccoli stir-fry with egg noodles
method_steps: Boil noodles per packet, drain, toss with sesame oil.
High-heat sear beef 90 seconds per side, remove.
Return beef, add soy and oyster sauce, toss through noodles.

recipes.name: Tandoori chicken with red lentil dal
method_steps: Marinate chicken in yoghurt and tandoori spice 15 min+.
Add lentils, tomato, 400 ml water, simmer 20 min until soft.
Finish dal with garam masala. Serve with chicken.

recipes.name: Turkey chilli with kidney beans
method_steps: Add onion, pepper, garlic, sweat 5 min.
Add tomatoes, beans, spices, simmer 30 min.

recipes.name: Oven cod with Mediterranean veg and butter beans
method_steps: Toss veg and beans with oil, oregano, salt. Roast 200 °C, 15 min.
Add cod on top, lemon over. Roast 10 min until flaking.

recipes.name: Shakshuka with feta and wholemeal pitta
method_steps: Crack eggs into wells, cover, cook 5 min until set.
Crumble feta on top. Serve with warmed pitta.

recipes.name: Pesto chicken wholemeal pasta
method_steps: Pan-cook chicken 6 min per side, rest, slice.
Toss pasta with pesto, tomatoes, chicken, rocket, parmesan.

recipes.name: Air fryer pork loin with apple slaw and new potatoes
method_steps: Air fry pork loin 190 °C, 18–20 min until 63 °C internal, rest.
Air fry potatoes 200 °C, 20 min tossed in a little oil.
Shred cabbage, carrot, apple, dress with mayo and mustard.

recipes.name: Rump steak with sweet potato wedges and green beans
method_steps: Cut sweet potato into wedges, toss with oil and paprika, air fry 200 °C, 18 min.
High-heat sear steak 2 min per side, rest 5 min.

recipes.name: Crispy tofu with black bean sauce and rice
method_steps: Toss pressed tofu cubes with cornflour, air fry 200 °C, 15 min until crisp.
Stir-fry garlic, ginger, pak choi 2 min, add black bean sauce and 2 tbsp water.
Toss tofu through. Serve with rice.

recipes.name: Chickpea and spinach curry with brown rice
method_steps: Sweat onion and garlic 5 min, add curry powder 1 min.
Add tomato, chickpeas, soya mince, 150 ml water. Simmer 15 min.

recipes.name: Garlic prawn noodles
method_steps: High heat, fry garlic and chilli 30 s, add prawns 2 min.
Toss with noodles, soy, fish sauce, lime. Finish with spring onion.

recipes.name: Lamb kofta with flatbread and tzatziki
method_steps: Mix mince with spices, shape into 4 kofta.
Grate cucumber, mix with yoghurt and garlic for tzatziki.
Wrap kofta in flatbread with tzatziki and red onion.

recipes.name: Protein overnight oats with berries
method_steps: Mix oats, whey, milk, chia in a jar.

recipes.name: Egg white and turkey bacon breakfast muffins
method_steps: Whisk whites and whole eggs together.
Divide bacon, cheese, spinach across 6 muffin tin wells.

recipes.name: Greek yoghurt bowl with granola and honey
method_steps: Layer yoghurt, granola, blueberries. Drizzle honey.

recipes.name: Cottage cheese scrambled eggs on rye
method_steps: Whisk eggs, low heat, stir gently.
Off heat, fold in cottage cheese.
Toast rye, top with eggs and chives.

recipes.name: Protein banana pancakes
method_steps: Blend all ingredients to a batter.
Cook 3–4 small pancakes on a non-stick pan, 1–2 min per side.

recipes.name: Smoked salmon and cream cheese bagel
method_steps: Split and toast bagel. Spread cream cheese. Layer salmon, onion, capers.

recipes.name: Tuna and sweetcorn on rice cakes
method_steps: Mix tuna, sweetcorn, mayo. Top rice cakes.

recipes.name: High-volume chicken salad (cut phase)
method_steps: Slice chicken. Combine with veg and feta. Dress with oil and balsamic.

recipes.name: Mass-gainer rice and beef mince bowl (bulk phase)
method_steps: Brown mince, add garlic and peas.
Finish with soy and sesame oil. Serve over rice.

recipes.name: Slow cooker beef and barley stew
method_steps: Sear beef in a hot pan, transfer to slow cooker.

recipes.name: Tuna poke bowl
method_steps: Cook sushi rice per packet, season with a splash of rice vinegar.
Dice tuna, toss with soy and sesame oil.
Bowl with rice, tuna, edamame, cucumber, avocado, nori.

recipes.name: Grilled halloumi and roasted veg wrap
method_steps: Spread hummus on wrap, layer halloumi, veg, rocket. Roll.

recipes.name: Overnight chia pudding with berries
method_steps: Whisk chia, milk, protein and honey in a jar.

recipes.name: Protein French toast with berries
method_steps: Dip bread slices, fry 2 min each side.
Top with warmed berries and syrup.

recipes.name: Turmeric tofu scramble on sourdough
method_steps: Crumble tofu into hot oiled pan.
Wilt spinach, toast bread, serve with tomatoes.

recipes.name: Savoury protein oats with egg and spinach
method_steps: Top with a fried or poached egg.

recipes.name: Breakfast burrito with black beans
method_steps: Fill wrap with everything, roll tightly.

recipes.name: Skyr bowl with kiwi and seeds
method_steps: Top with sliced kiwi, seeds, honey.

recipes.name: Kefir protein oat smoothie
method_steps: Pour into a flask for the commute.

recipes.name: Microwave protein rice pudding
method_steps: Cook rice in milk in the microwave 5 min, stirring.
Cool 2 min, stir in protein + vanilla.

recipes.name: Tuna cucumber boats
method_steps: Mix tuna with mayo + spring onion.

recipes.name: Paprika roasted chickpeas
method_steps: Roast 25 min at 200 C until crunchy.

recipes.name: Skyr with dark chocolate and walnuts
Beef jerky and apple
method_steps: Pack in a bag for later.

recipes.name: Puy lentil bolognese with protein pasta
method_steps: Soften onion, carrot, celery, garlic in oil.
Add lentils, passata, herbs, simmer 15 min.
Cook pasta, toss, top with nutritional yeast.

recipes.name: Tempeh teriyaki with jasmine rice
method_steps: Pan-fry tempeh slices in sesame oil 5 min.

recipes.name: Chana masala with brown rice
method_steps: Add spices, tomatoes, chickpeas, simmer 15 min.

recipes.name: Baked tofu katsu curry
method_steps: Press tofu, dust with flour, bake 20 min at 200 C.
Soften onion, add curry powder, coconut milk, simmer.
Serve tofu over rice with sauce.

recipes.name: Black bean burger with sweet potato wedges
method_steps: Mash beans with flour, onion, spices, form patty.
Wedge sweet potato, oil, bake 25 min.
Pan-fry patty 4 min each side, serve in bun.

recipes.name: Seitan black bean stir fry
method_steps: Add veg, garlic, sauce, 3 min more. Serve.

recipes.name: Cod tray bake with greens
method_steps: Add cod, asparagus, tomatoes, lemon, 12 min more.

recipes.name: Turkey larb lettuce wraps
method_steps: Off heat, stir in fish sauce, lime, herbs, chilli.

recipes.name: Chicken shirataki noodle stir fry
method_steps: Add aromatics, pak choi, noodles, soy, toss 2 min.

recipes.name: Egg white veg omelette
method_steps: Pour in whisked eggs, cook 2 min.

recipes.name: Peanut chicken with jasmine rice
method_steps: Whisk peanut, coconut, soy, lime; simmer 2 min.

recipes.name: XL beef burrito bowl
method_steps: Layer rice, beef, beans, corn, avocado, cheese, lime.

recipes.name: Creamy salmon pasta
method_steps: Boil pasta with peas last 2 min.
Flake salmon through drained pasta with cream cheese, spinach, lemon, parmesan.

recipes.name: Double chicken quesadilla
method_steps: Layer cheese, chicken, beans, peppers, chipotle between wraps.
Pan-fry 3 min each side until golden.

recipes.name: Korean gochujang chicken with cauliflower rice
method_steps: Steam cauli rice + pak choi, plate.

recipes.name: Vietnamese chicken vermicelli bowl
method_steps: Layer noodles, salad, chicken; dress with fish sauce + lime; top with herbs + peanuts.

recipes.name: Turkish lamb kebab over bulgur
method_steps: Mix lamb with onion, herbs, spices; form kebabs.

recipes.name: Moroccan chicken with couscous
method_steps: Add spice, tomato, lemon, apricots; simmer 15 min.

recipes.name: Jerk chicken with rice and black beans
method_steps: Rub chicken with jerk + oil, bake 25 min at 200 C.

recipes.name: Grilled squid with rocket and lemon
method_steps: Score squid, griddle 1 min each side.
Toss rocket + tomatoes in oil + lemon.

recipes.name: Turkey meatballs in marinara
method_steps: Mix turkey, egg, flour; form balls.
Add onion, garlic, passata, herbs; simmer 12 min.

recipes.name: Sea bream with salsa verde and fennel
method_steps: Slice fennel, roast with tomatoes 12 min at 200 C.
Blitz parsley, capers, oil, lemon; spoon over.

recipes.name: Beef bibimbap
method_steps: Assemble, fried egg on top, sauce + seeds.

recipes.name: Vietnamese bun cha pork
method_steps: Plate with fresh herbs, salad, dressing.

recipes.name: Chickpea and apricot tagine
method_steps: Add spice, tomatoes, chickpeas, apricots; simmer 15 min.

recipes.name: Chickpea shakshuka
method_steps: Soften onion, pepper, garlic in oil.
Add spices, tomato, chickpeas; simmer 10 min.
Crack in eggs, cover 4 min, crumble feta.

recipes.name: Greek beef orzo (giouvetsi-style)
method_steps: Add onion, garlic, tomato, herbs; simmer 20 min.
Stir through pasta last 10 min, parmesan on top.

recipes.name: Thai red prawn curry
method_steps: Add coconut, prawns, bamboo, pak choi; simmer 5 min.

recipes.name: Italian sausage and bean stew
method_steps: Add tomato, beans, herbs; simmer 12 min.

recipes.name: Tuna Niçoise salad
method_steps: Sear tuna 1 min each side, slice.

recipes.name: Greek lamb kofta with tzatziki
method_steps: Form kofta, pan-fry 4 min each side.
Warm pitta, fill with salad + kofta + tzatziki.

recipes.name: Korean beef rice bowl
method_steps: Brown beef with garlic, ginger, soy, sesame.
Top rice with beef, fried egg, kimchi.

recipes.name: Peri peri chicken, rice and beans
method_steps: Marinade chicken in hot sauce, paprika, garlic, oil.

recipes.name: Beef stroganoff with rice
method_steps: Add mustard + soured cream, return beef, heat through.

recipes.name: Turkish eggs (cilbir)
method_steps: Spoon yoghurt on plate, eggs on top, drizzle warm oil + paprika, dill, toast.

recipes.name: Nordic oats with berries and seeds
Quark bowl with almonds and pear
method_steps: Spoon quark, top with pear, almonds, honey.

recipes.name: Bacon egg protein muffin (single)
method_steps: Layer bacon, spinach, tomato in tin.
Pour egg, bake 15 min at 180 C.

recipes.name: Cottage cheese and ricotta toast with tomato
Hummus with veg sticks and pitta
Greek yoghurt with walnuts and honey
method_steps: Spoon yoghurt, top with nuts + honey.

recipes.name: Falafel wrap box
method_steps: Mash chickpeas with flour, garlic, spices, herbs.
Form balls, bake 20 min at 200 C.

recipes.name: Slow cooker chicken tikka
method_steps: Combine all except rice in slow cooker.

recipes.name: Slow cooker BBQ pulled pork
method_steps: Pork, onion, garlic, paprika, half sauce in cooker.
Stir rest of sauce, serve in buns with slaw.

recipes.name: Pressure cooker red dal
method_steps: Pressure cook lentils + tomato + aromatics 8 min.

recipes.name: Slow cooker beef ragu
method_steps: All in cooker except pasta + cheese.

recipes.name: Big batch chilli con carne
method_steps: Add everything except rice, simmer 25 min.

recipes.name: Slow cooker chickpea curry
method_steps: All except rice + spinach in cooker.
Stir spinach last 10 min, serve with rice.

recipes.name: Tray-bake chicken and sweet potato
method_steps: Toss veg in oil + spice, bake 15 min 200 C.

recipes.name: Tray salmon with asparagus and potato
Tray harissa chickpea and aubergine
method_steps: Toss chickpeas + veg in harissa + oil, bake 30 min 200 C.

recipes.name: GF chicken fajita bowl
method_steps: Pan-fry chicken + peppers + onion with spices.

recipes.name: GF prawn coconut curry
method_steps: Fry paste, add coconut + prawns + pak choi, 5 min.

recipes.name: GF steak with potato salad
method_steps: Boil potatoes, dress with mayo + mustard.
Pan-sear steak 3 min each side, rest.

recipes.name: GF salmon fish cakes with salad
method_steps: Flake salmon, mix with potato, egg, onion.
Form cakes, fry 3 min each side.

recipes.name: Japanese chicken katsu curry
method_steps: Make curry sauce with onion, curry powder, tonkatsu.

recipes.name: Quick miso chicken ramen
method_steps: Simmer chicken in dashi 8 min, slice.
Top with chicken, halved soft egg, veg, sesame, nori.

recipes.name: Filipino chicken adobo
method_steps: Combine all except rice in pan.

recipes.name: Malaysian chicken laksa
method_steps: Cook noodles, bowl with veg + broth + herbs + lime.

recipes.name: Japanese soba noodle salad with edamame
method_steps: Dress with soy, vinegar, sesame oil.

recipes.name: Cauliflower steak with tahini and chickpeas
method_steps: Slice cauli, oil + spice, roast 25 min 200 C with chickpeas.

recipes.name: Miso glazed aubergine with tofu rice
method_steps: Halve aubergine, brush with miso + mirin, bake 20 min 200 C.

recipes.name: Puy lentil salad with feta and roast veg
method_steps: Toss with lentils, feta, oil, lemon.

recipes.name: Quick soy prawn rice bowl
method_steps: Stir-fry prawns 2 min with garlic, ginger.

recipes.name: Cod with chorizo and butter beans
Chicken noodle soup
method_steps: Simmer chicken in stock 15 min, shred.

recipes.name: Scrambled egg and avocado on toast
Protein pancake stack
method_steps: Blend oats, protein, egg, whites, banana, powder.

recipes.name: Cajun chicken with courgetti
method_steps: Wilt courgetti + tomatoes in same pan.

recipes.name: Seared tuna steak salad
method_steps: Assemble salad, dress, slice tuna on top.

recipes.name: Lemon salmon courgetti
method_steps: Pan-fry salmon skin-down 4 min, flip 2 min.

recipes.name: Chicken and vegetable broth bowl
method_steps: Poach chicken in stock 12 min, shred.

recipes.name: Light fish pie
method_steps: Top with mash + cheese, bake 20 min.

recipes.name: Chicken and mushroom risotto
method_steps: Add rice, stock ladle by ladle 18 min.

recipes.name: Sweet and sour pork with rice
method_steps: Whisk soy, vinegar, honey, cornflour, glaze.

recipes.name: Double beef burger and sweet potato fries
method_steps: Wedge sweet potato, oil, bake 25 min 200 C.
Form 2 patties, pan-fry 3 min each side.

recipes.name: Chicken parmigiana with pasta
method_steps: Top with passata + mozzarella, bake 10 min 200 C.

recipes.name: Steak, chips and peppercorn sauce
method_steps: Cut potato chips, oil, bake 25 min 200 C.
Sear steak 3 min each side, rest.
Deglaze pan with pepper + crème fraîche + mustard.

recipes.name: Mass-gainer beef burrito bowl
method_steps: Layer everything in a big bowl.

recipes.name: Tray of bacon egg muffins (batch)
method_steps: Layer in 6 muffin tin with fillings.

recipes.name: Light eggs benedict on muffin
method_steps: Layer on toasted bread with ham + eggs + sauce.

recipes.name: Turkey and cheese roll-ups
method_steps: Layer cheese on turkey (use pre-cooked slices).

recipes.name: Vegan mushroom stroganoff
method_steps: Thicken oat milk with cornflour + mustard.

recipes.name: Vegan quinoa buddha bowl
method_steps: Cube sweet potato, roast 25 min 200 C.

recipes.name: Pork tenderloin with apple and mash
method_steps: Roast pork 20 min 200 C with apple.

recipes.name: Haddock fish finger wrap
method_steps: Cut fish strips, flour, egg, panko.
Fill wrap with salad + mayo + fingers.
